meta.title: Evaluation — Jordan Kim — H1 2026
meta.subtitle: Mid-cycle review · calibration packet ref CP-2026-04

sections.title: 9-grid placement
sections.body_markdown:
- **Performance:** **Meets** — sustained delivery with low rework; evidence in next section.
- **Potential:** **High** — repeatedly stretches into cross-team design and mentoring without dropping commitments.

sections.title: Evidence
sections.body_markdown:
- **Led** migration of **auth** to new provider — **0** Sev1; **2** runbooks updated; staff review from **@principal**.
- **Mentored** **@newhire** on **billing service**; PR quality improved per review dashboard **(internal link)**.
- **Incident** response: owned comms for **INC-1701**; customer-facing timeline praised by CS leadership.

sections.title: Development plan
sections.body_markdown:
1. **System design at scale** — own design doc for **Q3** reliability program; staff review by **Aug 1**.
2. **Communication** in cross-team forums — lead **2** RFC discussions next half; measure via RFC closure dates.
3. **Delegation** — distribute **on-call** shadowing so bench depth improves by **Q4**.

sections.title: Manager comments
sections.body_markdown:
Summary: Jordan sustains **strong** delivery and **raises** the bar for operational discipline. Recommended **comp** banding per **calibration** packet **CP-2026-04**; no formal concerns.

Calibration: aligned with peer managers on **scope** and **impact**; documentation attached to HR folder.
